testcase.name: test_post_company_persists_company_code

failure.message:
AssertionError: POST /companies did NOT persist company_code='SKS' — got '6B8DAC'. BUG: CompanyCreate model is missing `company_code` field AND create_company() does not pass it to Company(...). assert '6B8DAC' == 'SKS'
- SKS + 6B8DAC

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter25_phase_c.py:83: in test_post_company_persists_company_code assert c.get("company_code") == "SKS", ( E AssertionError: POST /companies did NOT persist company_code='SKS' — got '6B8DAC'. BUG: CompanyCreate model is missing `company_code` field AND create_company() does not pass it to Company(...). E assert '6B8DAC' == 'SKS' E E - SKS E + 6B8DAC
